text:
by matching the drug products on the Part D Plan submitted formulary to FDB. Part D plan 
sponsors submit the formulary to the CMS Health Plan Management System (HPMS). Plans identify 
the drug products on their formularies using the National Library of Medicine RxNorm Concept Unique 
Identifiers (RXCUIs). Each RXCUI corresponds to a unique brand name and clinical formulation (same 
ingredients, strength, and dosage form). Additional details regarding the FDB source data are available
